title: OP-3 Controlled Failure Recovery And Rollback
acceptance_criteria: clean-main baseline verification passed before OP-3 changes
a controlled failure executes through a real child process and exits nonzero
the failure has a fixed injection point and exact expected diagnosis
the failure is introduced only under ignored disposable repository-local state
the failure is classified as pilot-introduced
rollback restores the baseline bytes exactly
rollback restores the baseline SHA-256 exactly
rollback leaves no partial, staged, lock, backup, or orphan files
recovery succeeds after rollback
three repeated deterministic rehearsal reports are byte-identical
nondeterministic timing measurements are recorded separately from deterministic output
tracked Git status is identical before and after each rehearsal
legacy/pre-orbital-compute-lab remains untouched and resolves to c93c7366edcd86b83896c3c39b753805183c3126
existing status, run-scenario, run-suite, and summarize-scenario behavior remains unchanged
representative OP-2 output hashes remain unchanged
no current capability is overstated
canonical .\eng.ps1 verify executes the OP-3 validator
focused tests and the complete Node test suite pass
the task contract validates against harness source 011880bfe915f0224f1eccd8bfa9a5ba57a68e36
installed-harness evidence is bound to the exact final Orbital commit
installed-harness external evidence reports target_mutation_detected: false
integrity validation is valid with authenticity not_claimed
terminal scans report zero raw-root, encoded-root, sentinel, and scanner-error findings
no milestone-summary document or duplicate active measurement/risk document is added
external_side_effect_boundaries: no wallet, payment, trading, or real mining behavior
rollback_method: The rehearsal rollback deletes and restores only ignored disposable state under .agent-harness/tmp/op-3-failure-recovery/, rewrites the disposable suite from the baseline byte snapshot, verifies the restored SHA-256 matches the baseline, reruns the child command successfully, and removes the workspace in a finally path. If the OP-3 product change itself must be removed, revert the OP-3 commit range on the pilot/op-3-failure-recovery branch and rerun pwsh -NoProfile -File .\eng.ps1 verify.
evidence_expectations: clean-main baseline verification and regression hashes recorded under ignored .agent-harness/artifacts/op-3-failure-recovery/
controlled failure evidence records the actual failing child command, nonzero exit, and exact expected diagnosis
rollback evidence records baseline/restored hashes, byte equality, cleanup result, and separate elapsed timing
recovery evidence records successful rerun and repeated deterministic report comparison
final verification evidence is bound to the exact final Orbital commit
installed-harness evidence is generated from harness 011880bfe915f0224f1eccd8bfa9a5ba57a68e36
review-bundle.v2 declares required supplements for final verification, controlled failure and diagnosis, rollback proof, recovery proof, and regression hash comparison
terminal scan raw-root, encoded-root, sentinel, and scanner-error counts are zero
c3_harness_004_disposition: open / accepted_for_offline_v0.2; not fixed, passed, or closed by OP-3
independent_review_status: not_run; branch is ready for independent review after PR creation
